statement: In every magma, Equation 3846 (`x * y = (z * w) * (z * x)`) implies Equation 3413 (`x * y = z * (z * (x * x))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0068
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op z w) (op z x))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op z (op z (op x x)))
